entities.summary: Orchestrates inference pipeline: scheduler + model runner + API

detail.name: LLMEngine
detail.description: Facade coordinating Scheduler, ModelRunner, and user-facing API. Single entry point for all inference.
detail.why: User needs one simple interface, not knowledge of Scheduler + ModelRunner + BlockManager internals

teaches.explain: Single interface wrapping complex subsystem. User calls one method; internally coordinates multiple components. Reduces coupling.

detail.design: Synchronous generate() wraps async step loop for API simplicity
detail.convention: External code only interacts with LLMEngine — never directly with Scheduler or ModelRunner

entities.summary: Initialize all engine subsystems: scheduler, block manager, model runner

detail.name: __init__
detail.description: Creates and connects Scheduler, BlockManager, ModelRunner. Starts model runner process.

teaches.explain: Build complex objects by composing simpler ones as fields. Each sub-component has single responsibility. Easier to test and replace.

entities.summary: Graceful shutdown: stop model runner process and free resources

detail.name: exit
detail.description: Sends exit command to ModelRunner process, waits for termination.

teaches.explain: Notify sub-processes/threads to stop, wait for completion, then release resources. Prevents zombie processes and resource leaks.

entities.summary: Submit new generation request to the engine

detail.name: add_request
detail.description: Creates Sequence from prompt tokens and sampling params, adds to scheduler queue.

teaches.explain: Decouple submission from execution. Caller submits to queue, engine processes when resources available. Enables batching and flow control.

detail.name: step
detail.description: Schedule → prepare inputs → model forward → sample → update sequences. The core engine loop body.

teaches.explain: Break continuous processing into discrete steps. Each step: schedule, execute, update. Enables batching across requests within one step.

entities.summary: Check if all submitted requests have completed generation

detail.name: is_finished
detail.description: Returns True when scheduler has no waiting or running sequences.

teaches.explain: Poll-based completion check. Caller loops calling step() until is_finished(). Simple synchronous API over async internals.

entities.summary: Synchronous generation: submit request and loop until complete

detail.name: generate
detail.description: Convenience API: adds request, repeatedly calls step(), returns results when finished.

teaches.explain: Wrap async/step-based internals with blocking API. Simpler for users who dont need streaming. Hides the step loop.
